calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL STERN FOR PLAINTIFF BENJAMIN ARMS APARTMENTS. PROPERTY MANAGER RICHARD KEHL ALSO PRESENT.
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY JOAN KUBOTA FOR DEFENDANT CARL SAXEN

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES BY 11:59PM 7/31/05. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS AND FEES. MUTUAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS REGARDING TENANCY. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL BACKRENT. KEYS AND GARAGE DOOR OPENER TO BE LEFT WITH LANDLORD. DEFENDANT TO LEAVE PREMISES FREE OF PERSONAL PROPERTY.SECURITY DEPOSIT IS FORFEITED.IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH TERMS OF AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITHIN 5 DAYS. AGREEMENT WILL NOT BE FILED UNLESS THERE IS A BREACH OF TERMS.
NO FURTHER STAYS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:GEN FUJIOKA ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: CARL SAUCEDA(218)
